Id1.text: The United States is the location of Abilene, part of Jones County, Texas, and has the capital of Washington DC.

Id2.text: Abilene is in Jones County, Texas; which is in the United States. Washington, D.C. is the capital.

Id3.text: The city of Abilene is in Jones County, Texas in the United States whose capital city is Washington D.C.
